name: music-playlist-migrator
description: 一键跨平台迁移歌单 — 截图识别 → 扫码登录 → 批量导入

scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.start: npm run build:client && cd server && npm start
